content.text: How can I automate the processing of a given URL by matching it against available service plugins, even if it first requires following HTTP redirects?
What prevents this redirect resolution from causing an infinite loop if the server keeps cycling between two URLs?
The current implementation lacks explicit cycle detection. To prevent infinite loops, you would need to track already visited URLs and stop recursion when a duplicate is encountered.
That makes sense; cycle detection seems like an essential enhancement.
